internal_anchors.total_links: verified by test suite (2244 tests passed, Section 3: Internal Links)
internal_anchors.details: All internal href='#...' targets and showTab() calls verified by test suite. No manual recheck needed.

tab_structure.details: 11 tabs with unique IDs, no empty tabs, no heading hierarchy violations. Default active tab is 'overview'. No sectionNav() function calls found — site uses tab buttons for navigation, not prev/next chain. This is by design, not an error.

external_links.details: 54 of 55 non-citation external links OK. 1 timeout (NASA PODAAC GRACE document — government site, likely transient). All DOI/publisher links excluded per policy.

data_prose_consistency.details: 70 WINs in wins.json, 70 table rows in HTML. Verdict counts: Refuted by Data=9, Self-Contradicted=13, Misleading=23, Std Model Explains=17, Not Demonstrated=4, Unfalsifiable=4. new_in_v51=31. code_analysis: reviewed=69, pending=1, hardcoded=25, live_fetch=4, none=41, relabels_standard=49, post_hoc=68, derives_from_dome=2. All counts computed from wins.json match HTML output.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 70 WIN anchors (win001–win069 incl. win058b) present in HTML. All 70 table rows present. All verdict CSS classes match wins.json verdicts. Detail groups internally consistent (8 groups verified).

notes: WIN-025 removed from dome site 2026-03-15; we retain it in our review with verdict 'Std Model Explains' — intentional coverage of removed claims.
WIN-058b is our split entry for PRED-KAPPA-001 (not a separate dome WIN number) — internal analytical convenience, not a dome-side ID.
Dome site lists 69 WINs (001–069 minus removed WIN-025). Our 70 entries = 69 dome WINs + WIN-025 retained + WIN-058b split.
All WIN titles cross-checked — no title/claim drift detected between dome site and our wins.json claims.

uncounted_failures_json.note: Schema is object with nested structure (not flat array). Contains dome_claimed_failures list and metadata. Schema valid for its purpose.

discoverability.details: All discoverability files present and well-formed. All four required meta tags present in HTML head.

expansion_tracker.details: next_id=60, max_id=59 — no collision risk. 1 ID gap (EXP-052). 18 orphaned output files in expansions/ with no matching tracker entry — these are legacy files from before tracker was introduced or from ID format changes. No phantom entries, no stale pending items. Priority-queue coupling: 1 coupled-category item, correctly represented in priority queue.

at_risk_files.risk: Exists on workspace mount but not in git. At risk of data loss if workspace is recycled.

workspace_only_files.curmudgeon_reviews: All 184 reviews synced between workspace and git — no workspace-only reviews.
workspace_only_files.details: 1 workspace-only file detected: EXP-060.json in analyst expansions. This is likely a very recent analyst output not yet committed by workspace-sync. Should resolve on next workspace-sync run.

workspace_sync_skip_log.details: MAJOR: 4 files have repeated direction-violation skips (>=3 in 24h). Analysis: (1) morning-briefing.txt is workspace-owned — this is a FALSE POSITIVE, workspace-sync should NOT be skipping it. The direction guard may have an incorrect classification. (2) CAT-005.json, PROP-003.json, PROP-004.json are in append-only directories — workspace-sync attempting to push these and being blocked suggests either misclassification or the guard treating append-only dirs as git-owned. Requires investigation by tinker or human operator.

issues.description: CLAUDE.md wins.json schema says id range is '001'–'067' but actual data contains 70 entries through '069' including '058b'. This is a hardcoded count that should be a query command.

project_documentation.file_map_check: All 5 spot-checked paths exist. All reference/ files exist. All data/ files exist. All build-scripts/ files exist.
project_documentation.schedule_table: 8 agents listed with schedules matching CLAUDE.md documentation.
project_documentation.details: One hardcoded ID range found in CLAUDE.md. All file paths verified. Schedule table appears current.

build_reproducibility.details: Freshly built docs/index.html matches git HEAD exactly (0 diff lines). Build is fully reproducible. Note: workspace mount copy is stale (2 lines differ from git HEAD — a DOI reference update and a WIN-048 update note). This is expected FUSE staleness, not build drift. The published GitHub Pages site serves the git version.

issues_found.description: Workspace-sync direction guard is repeatedly skipping 4 files in the last 24h: morning-briefing.txt (workspace-owned, should NOT be skipped), CAT-005.json, PROP-003.json, PROP-004.json (append-only dirs). This indicates either a misclassification in the direction guard's OWNED_BY_GIT list or a bug in how append-only directories are handled.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Tinker or human operator should audit workspace-sync.md's OWNED_BY_GIT array for false inclusions. morning-briefing.txt is explicitly workspace-owned in CLAUDE.md's ownership table — if workspace-sync is skipping it, the guard's list is wrong. For the append-only files, verify the guard distinguishes 'git-owned' from 'append-only' correctly.

issues_found.description: CLAUDE.md hardcodes WIN ID range as '001'–'067' but actual data has 70 entries through '069' including '058b'. This violates the project's own rule against hardcoded counts.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Change to: `id`: String identifier (three-digit or with suffix, e.g. '001', '058b') — query actual range with: node -e "const w=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('data/wins.json','utf8'));console.log(w[0].id,'to',w[w.length-1].id,'('+w.length+' entries)')"

issues_found.description: EXP-060.json exists on workspace mount but not in git. At risk of data loss.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Should be committed by next workspace-sync run. If still missing from git after 8h, manually copy from workspace to clean clone and commit.

issues_found.description: 18 orphaned expansion output files in monitor/analyst/expansions/ with no matching tracker entry. These are completed work the decider cannot discover through the tracker.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Most appear to be legacy files from before the tracker was introduced (they use old naming conventions like EXP-004-sec31-32.json). Consider archiving or adding tracker entries for any that contain unintegrated content.

issues_found.description: EXP-052 is missing from tracker (ID gap between EXP-051 and EXP-053). May be a deleted or skipped item.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Verify whether EXP-052 was intentionally skipped or lost. If lost, the next_id counter (60) is still correct, so no collision risk.

issues_found.description: NASA PODAAC GRACE document URL timed out (15s). Government sites can be slow — likely transient.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Monitor on next run. If persistent, find updated URL.

issues_found.description: Workspace mount docs/index.html is stale relative to git HEAD (2 lines differ: a DOI reference and a WIN-048 update note). Not affecting published site.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Will resolve on next build.js publish run. No action needed.

summary: Site structural health is good: all 2244 tests pass, build is fully reproducible (0 diff vs git HEAD), all 70 WIN anchors and table rows present, all external data-source links resolve (1 timeout), all discoverability files valid. Two major issues require attention: (1) workspace-sync direction guard is repeatedly skipping 4 files including the workspace-owned morning-briefing.txt — this indicates a misclassification bug in the guard's file list that needs investigation; (2) CLAUDE.md hardcodes the WIN ID range as '001'–'067' when the actual data now has 70 entries through '069'. Moderate issues: 1 workspace-only file at risk (EXP-060.json), 18 orphaned legacy expansion files, and 1 tracker ID gap (EXP-052). Overall status: WARN due to the direction-guard misclassification.
